ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-11-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by self represented plaintiff. There being no appearance, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). All previously imposed sanctions against the plaintiff are vacated. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

Defendant'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Dec-12-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Rebecca Turner (855-736-2489) appears as self-represented defendantntiff/defendant/moving/opposing party

No other appearance is made in this matter

There being no appearance by plaintiff, DEFENDANT N. TURNER Defendant'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint is GRANTED. The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim and that complies with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR No. 11185, e-mail: adelgado@sftc.org (L&M302)

Defendant'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Nov-28-2017 Continued To Dec-12-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Rebecca A. Turner, Esq. of Fog City Law, Tel. 855.736.4248, defendant appearing on her own behalf, by Court Call;
Cynthia A. Browing, Esq. of the Law Office of Cynthia A. Browning, Tel. 510.326.2367, plaintiff appearing on her own behalf, by Court Call.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the Court vacated its tentative ruling and continued the hearing on DEFENDANT N. TURNER'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint to December 12, 2017 at 9:30 am in Department 302 for Anthony Sampson to appear before the Court and testify under oath re: service of summons and complaint. Judge: Newton Lam; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR#6576, e-mail: rhunter@sftc.org.
